overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a fur cloak running through a war-torn medieval castle landscape under a burning red sky. The character navigates through ruins and wooden barricades toward a large stone fortress with the burning Erdtree visible in the background.

events.description: passing a glowing blue site of grace magical object on the right
the massive burning Erdtree becomes visible on the left horizon, casting intense red light

entered.detail: crumbling medieval stone walls and towers in the distance
spiked wooden defensive barriers lining the path
glowing blue magical checkpoint object emitting particles
twisted leafless trees against the red sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a ruined stone approach scattered with debris and wooden barricades. A glowing blue site of grace is passed on the right as the character heads toward distant castle structures under the red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open battlefield with burning Erdtree visible

events.description: the massive burning Erdtree enters the frame on the left, dominating the skyline

entered.detail: massive tree engulfed in red flames towering against the sky
tree emitting bright golden light in the middle distance
tall stone spires and fortifications of the main castle

segments.scene_description: The massive burning Erdtree dominates the left side of the sky as the character sprints along an open battlefield path. Stone castle towers rise in the distance while wooden spiked fences line the route.

events.description: path narrows as tall castle walls rise on the right side, approaching the main gate

agents.ego_description: running toward the castle entrance with stone walls closing in on the right, Erdtree receding to the left

entered.detail: tall stone fortification walls with crenellations and weathered surfaces
massive gnarled dead tree standing before the castle gate

segments.scene_description: Approaching the castle fortifications, tall stone walls rise on the right and a massive dead tree stands before the gate. The burning Erdtree recedes into the background left as the path narrows toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle gate approach with fallen soldiers

events.description: passing dead bodies and scattered weapons littering the ground near the castle entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the castle gate, navigating around debris and fallen bodies on the ground

entered.detail: large fortified entrance with metal portcullis and stone archway
fallen soldiers and corpses scattered on the ground with weapons

segments.scene_description: The character runs the final approach to the castle gate, passing dead bodies and scattered weapons on the ground. The stone walls loom large on both sides and the massive dead tree fills the left foreground near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a war-torn approach that transitions from open ruins into the narrow, oppressive entrance of a massive stone fortress. It begins with the character sprinting through a debris-strewn stone path, passing a glowing blue site of grace on the right under a burning red sky. As the path opens into a wide battlefield, the massive burning Erdtree dominates the left horizon while wooden spiked fences line the route toward distant castle towers. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the fortifications, where tall stone walls rise on the right and a massive dead tree emerges to frame the narrowing gateway. Finally, the camera follows the character through a gauntlet of fallen bodies and scattered weapons, with the looming walls and the dead tree closing in as they reach the castle gate.
